overallAssessment: Solid plan that correctly identifies the shader-uniform approach for bass modulation and the replacement strategy. Needs adjustments for reusing existing infrastructure (findConnections, quality fields, electric arc pattern) rather than creating parallel systems.

stepReviews.comment: Extracting a generic Overlay interface is clean but lightweight enough to inline. The ConstellationLines interface (init, draw, cleanup, setOpacity, activeVertexCount) is already the right shape. Instead of a new file, just export the interface from a shared location or use a type alias. Acceptable either way — just don't over-engineer it.
No-op at runtime, just type alignment. Fine.
Correct — OverlayAttachment at modeManager.ts:24-27 currently hard-types overlay as ConstellationLines. Must be generalized.

The existing subdivideEdges.ts already tessellates edges into segments with aEdgeParam, aEdgeTangent, and aRandom — very similar output shape. The Bezier generator should follow the same SubdivisionResult return pattern for consistency. Also: the plan says 'segments * 2 for LineSegments' but LineSegments uses pairs — for N segments you need N*2 vertices (each segment is an independent pair). Correct, but be explicit that this means 5 segments = 10 vertices per connection, not 6 vertices. The perpendicular vector computation should use the same tangent-based approach as electricArcConstellation.vert.glsl (cross with up vector, fallback to cross with right vector if degenerate).

Critical missing detail: findConnections is a private function inside constellationLines.ts (lines 49-88). The plan must extract it to a shared utility (e.g., src/visual/utils/findConnections.ts) or duplicate it. Extraction is strongly preferred since both systems need the same logic. Also: the plan mentions 'BezierWebConfig' but should reuse the existing quality profile fields rather than a separate config object — see step 7 notes.

The existing electricArcConstellation.vert.glsl (110 lines) already implements perpendicular displacement modulated by bass energy using aEdgeTangent cross products and sin(aEdgeParam * PI) weighting. The Bezier vertex shader is conceptually identical but with a pre-computed arc offset instead of noise-based displacement. Strongly consider extending or parameterizing the electric arc shader rather than writing a new one from scratch. At minimum, reuse the same deformation pipeline (radial scale, bass expansion, twist, field spread, breathing) from constellation.vert.glsl — don't rewrite it.

Adding enableBezierWeb + maxBezierConnections + bezierSegments creates parallel fields alongside existing enableConstellationLines + maxConstellationSegments. Since the ticket explicitly replaces constellation lines with Bezier web, reuse the existing fields: enableConstellationLines stays as-is (controls whether any connection overlay is active), maxConstellationSegments becomes the connection budget, and add only bezierSegments (or repurpose arcSubdivisions which already controls tessellation granularity: low=0, medium=5, high=8). This avoids quality profile bloat and dead fields.

Replacement strategy is correct per ticket notes. The wiring at main.ts:176-190 is straightforward to swap. Keep the createConstellationLines import available but unused — don't delete it, as other tickets may reference it.
Test placement under tests/ is correct. Follow the pattern in tests/visual/systems/constellationLines.test.ts (30 test cases). The threeMocks helper at tests/helpers/threeMocks.ts should be reused.
Standard verification step. Matches Definition of Done and Shader Integrity Rules from CLAUDE.md.

missingSteps.title: Extract findConnections to shared utility
missingSteps.reason: findConnections (constellationLines.ts:49-88) is private but needed by both constellation and bezier systems. Extract to src/visual/utils/findConnections.ts with the Connection interface. Update constellationLines.ts to import from the shared location.

keyDecisionReviews.decision: Bass modulation via shader uniform rather than CPU geometry rebuild
keyDecisionReviews.comment: Correct approach. Matches the existing electric arc pattern which already does this with aEdgeTangent + uBassEnergy.
Lightweight and clean. Keep it minimal — just the 5 methods already on ConstellationLines.

keyDecisionReviews.decision: Replace constellation overlay with Bezier web
keyDecisionReviews.comment: Correct per ticket notes. Reuse quality fields rather than adding new ones.
Fragment shader handles palette/opacity/fog/chromatic dispersion identically for both line types.

keyDecisionReviews.decision: Tests placed under tests/ at repo root
keyDecisionReviews.comment: Matches existing convention (70+ test files in tests/).

riskAdditions: findConnections extraction could break existing constellationLines tests if import paths change — run existing tests after extraction.
Reusing arcSubdivisions for bezierSegments changes its semantic meaning — verify no other system reads this field with the old interpretation.
